title: Riot Platforms Reports Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Strategic Highlights
text: Riot Platforms reported total revenue of $647.4 million for 2025, compared to $376.7 million in 2024. The company achieved record annual revenue of $647 million and $302 million in gross profit. The increase was primarily driven by a $255.3 million increase in Bitcoin Mining revenue. Engineering revenue totaled $64.7 million for the year, compared to $38.5 million in 2024. Riot produced 5,686 bitcoin during 2025, compared to 4,828 during 2024. The company maintained a strong liquidity position with 18,005 bitcoin (with 3,977 held as collateral), equating to approximately $1.6 billion based on a market price of $87,498 per bitcoin as of December 31, 2025, and $309.8 million of cash on hand. Riot successfully commenced operations on the first phase of a lease with AMD, generating revenue as of January 2026. The company's transition from pure-play bitcoin miner to diversified infrastructure operator is delivering strong financial results and positioning RIOT for long-term growth in AI and HPC markets.
